message:
feat(3d): Add mathematical halo overlay and time-slot palette system

Significantly enhances the Three.js visualization with new visual elements
and smarter time-based palette cycling:

Mathematical Halo Overlay:
- Adds a sophisticated icosahedral wireframe structure with orbiting
  particles distributed via Fibonacci sphere algorithm (golden angle)
- Points animate with subtle wobble and scale pulsation for organic feel
- Respects device quality tier: disabled on low-end devices, particle
  count scales with quality multiplier (12-72 particles)
- Proper GPU resource cleanup via useEffect disposal hooks

Time-Slot System:
- Replaces simple hour-based palette selection with 20-minute slots
- Provides more frequent visual variety (72 slot changes/day vs 24)
- Uses memoized getSlot calculation for efficiency
- Updates every minute via interval timer

These changes create a more visually engaging hero section while
maintaining performance on lower-end devices through quality-aware
rendering decisions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
